Confirm.DeleteDescription: This action permanently deletes {{name}} including linked access credentials. This cannot be undone.

Toast.StatusSuccessDescription: The account status for {{name}} was updated.

SystemMessages.Description: Manage homepage announcements, maintenance notices, and other platform-wide communication. {{count}} messages are currently stored.

Fields.Title: Title
Fields.ExpiresAtHelp: Leave empty if the message should stay active until manually unpublished or deleted.
Fields.PublishedHelp: If disabled, the message is stored as a draft and is not shown on the homepage.

Dialog.CreateDescription: Create a new message for the public homepage. Save it as draft or publish it immediately.
Dialog.EditDescription: Update the message content, timing, and visibility.

Confirm.DeleteDescription: This action permanently deletes {{name}}. This cannot be undone.

Toast.MessageRequired: Enter the message body before saving.

CzechRanking.Title: Czech ranking backing data
CzechRanking.Description: Admin tools for monthly Czech ranking snapshots, synced ORIS ranking event results, and force refresh operations.
CzechRanking.ErrorTitle: Czech ranking data could not be loaded

Cards.SnapshotDatasetsHint: Uploaded monthly CSV datasets grouped by type and category.
Cards.SnapshotEntriesHint: Total number of ranking rows currently stored from CSV uploads.
Cards.EventDatasetsHint: ORIS ranking result datasets grouped by event, ranking type, and category.
Cards.EventResultsHint: Total number of individual ORIS ranking result rows currently available.

UploadDialog.Title: Upload Czech ranking snapshot
UploadDialog.Description: Upload a monthly ORIS snapshot for the selected ranking type and category. Event calculations always look for the snapshot from the previous month relative to the event date, and if it is missing they fall back to the latest older available snapshot.

Help.RankingType: Choose whether you are uploading a forest or sprint Czech ranking snapshot.
Help.RankingCategory: M = men (H20/H21), F = women (D20/D21). Upload each variant separately.
Help.ValidForMonth: Enter the month the snapshot is valid for, not the upload month. For example, an event in April 2026 normally uses the snapshot with value 2026-03. If that month is missing, the system uses the latest older snapshot available at the event date.
Help.File: Upload an ORIS export in CSV or TXT format, as long as the file content contains semicolon-separated CSV data.

UploadDialog.MissingFile: Select a CSV or TXT file before starting the upload.

SyncDialog.Title: Force ORIS synchronization
SyncDialog.Description: Fetch official Czech ranking event result datasets from ORIS for the selected scope.

Confirm.ClearAllSnapshotsDescription: This will remove all uploaded monthly Czech ranking snapshots from the database.
Confirm.ClearSnapshotDescription: This will remove the selected Czech ranking snapshot dataset from the database.
Confirm.ClearAllEventResultsDescription: This will remove all ORIS-synchronized Czech ranking event results from the database.
Confirm.ClearEventResultsDescription: This will remove the selected synchronized Czech ranking event result dataset from the database.

PrintWindow.Title: QR Code - OFeed Live Results
PrintWindow.Info: Scan this QR code to view live results online.

Toast.CopySuccessDescription: Boom! The link is now in your clipboard, share it away!

Card.Title: Configuration of apps
Card.Description: How to set up the apps to connect to OFeed.
Card.MissingPasswordDescription: Generate the password in the Event Password card before configuring the apps.

Navigator.Title: OFeed QR Code
Navigator.Text: Here is the QR code for the OFeed event to pair your mobile app O Checklist!

OChecklist.Description: Scan the QR code to set url, event id and password into the settings of OFeed connection. Click on the QR code icon in the settings in the app to launch the camera. You can use the button with app icon to get link to share credentials on single device.

QuickEvent.Description: Copy and paste these Credentials into OFeed service setup.

SIDroidConenctor.Description: Scan the QR code to set url, event id and password into the settings of OFeed connection. Click on the QR code icon in the settings in the app to launch the camera. You can use the button with app icon to get link to share credentials on single device.

PrintWindow.Subheader: Scan this QR code to pair your mobile app {{appName}} with the event.
PrintWindow.Footer: Please keep this information secure. If you encounter any issues, contact support.

Toast.CopyBaseUrl: Hop! Base URL is now in your clipboard, share it away!
Toast.CopyEventId: Hop! Event ID is now in your clipboard, share it away!

Card.Title: Visibility
Card.Description: Determines whether the event is public or private. Public events are displayed in the event list on the OFeed's main page, while private events are visible only to their organizer.

DangerZone.Title: Danger Zone
DangerZone.Description: Irreversible actions that will permanently delete data. Proceed with extreme caution.
DangerZone.Footer: These actions cannot be undone. Please ensure you have appropriate backups.

DeleteCompetitors.Title: Delete competitors
DeleteCompetitors.Description: If you uploaded Start list or Results for a wrong event, you can delete all competitors and start over. This button deletes all runners (Start list & Results).
DeleteCompetitors.ConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete all competitors? This action cannot be undone!

DeleteAllEventData.Title: Delete all event data
DeleteAllEventData.Description: If you need to completely remove all event data, including runners, classes, relays, and results, use this button. Be cautious, as this action is irreversible!
DeleteAllEventData.ConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete all event data? This will remove all results and cannot be undone!

DeleteEvent.Title: Delete event
DeleteEvent.Description: The event will be deleted. You have to delete all event data first. This action cannot be undone!
DeleteEvent.ConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this entire event? This action cannot be undone!

TroublesShooting.Title: Need Help or Have Questions?
TroublesShooting.Description: If you encounter an error or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.
TroublesShooting.Description1: Our support team is ready to assist you with any issues or questions. Reach out to us at

OAuth2.Title: OAuth2 API Access
OAuth2.Description: Generate credentials to access the API using OAuth2. You will need a Client ID and a Client Secret.
OAuth2.SecretWarningDescription: Your Client Secret is sensitive information. Do not share it with anyone and store it securely. It will not be shown again after you leave or refresh this page.

Toast.GenerateSuccessDescription: OAuth2 credentials have been successfully generated!
Toast.GenerateFailTitle: Something went wrong, please try again.

HowToUse.Title: How to use OAuth2
HowToUse.Description: Use your Client ID and Client Secret in a request with grant_type=client_credentials to the /auth/oauth2/token endpoint. Below is an example request using curl.

OtherIntegrations.Description: Connect your account with additional services and tools. New integrations will appear here over time.

Security.PasswordDescription: Here you can change your account password. We recommend using a strong, unique password.
